title: Animal Rehoming Listing Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Animal Rehoming Listing Services 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Pays for the cost of neuter/spay of stray cats. All animals: assists with veterinary costs associated with spay/neuter, dental care, large vet bills, and communal cremation costs. Also has animal rehoming listings on website. 310 SW 2nd Street #71 PO Box 71 Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 265-3719 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PIXIE PROJECT ADOPTION AND RESCUE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides adoption services for people looking for cats or dogs, focusing on finding life-long matches. Works with county shelters and rescues to offer support when they become overcrowded. Animals are examined by a veterinarian and thoroughly screened before entering the adoption center. All animals are spayed or neutered, vaccinated, and microchipped. Accepts owner-surrendered cats as time and circumstances allow. Also displays "courtesy posts" of animals needing to be rehomed on website. 510 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Call or visit website for more information Hours: Tuesday-Friday 11am-6pm, Saturday 11am-4pm by appointment Email (503) 542-3432 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY CENTRAL COAST HUMANE SOCIETY PIXIE PROJECT ADOPTION AND RESCUE
